description:
You are a senior frontend engineer.

Project stack:
- Next.js 16 (App Router)
- React 19
- TypeScript
- shadcn/ui
- @tanstack/react-query v5
- axios
- react-hook-form
- zod
- sonner (toast)

==================================================
TASK: CREATE CATEGORY-PRODUCT & PRODUCT MANAGEMENT UI
==================================================

BACKEND API AVAILABLE:

CATEGORY-PRODUCT:
GET /category-products
GET /category-products/:id
POST /category-products
PUT /category-products/:id
DELETE /category-products/:id

PRODUCT:
GET /products?page=1&limit=10&search=abc&categoryId=xxx
GET /products/:id
POST /products
PUT /products/:id
DELETE /products/:id

List response format:

{
  data: Entity[],
  pagination: {
    total,
    page,
    limit,
    totalPages,
    hasNextPage,
    hasPrevPage
  }
}

==================================================
ROUTES
==================================================

app/dashboard/category-products/page.tsx
app/dashboard/products/page.tsx

==================================================
STRUCTURE
==================================================

app/dashboard/category-products/
  page.tsx
  components/
    CategoryProductTable.tsx
    CategoryProductForm.tsx
    CategoryProductDialog.tsx

app/dashboard/products/
  page.tsx
  components/
    ProductTable.tsx
    ProductForm.tsx
    ProductDialog.tsx

lib/api/category-product.api.ts
lib/api/product.api.ts

types/category-product.type.ts
types/product.type.ts

==================================================
FEATURE REQUIREMENTS
==================================================

CATEGORY-PRODUCT PAGE:
- Table list
- Search with 300ms debounce
- Pagination
- Create / Edit / Delete
- Loading state
- Empty state
- Toast notifications

PRODUCT PAGE:
- Table list
- Search with 300ms debounce
- Filter by category (Select dropdown)
- Pagination
- Create / Edit / Delete
- Show category name in table
- Show image thumbnail
- Loading state
- Empty state
- Toast notifications

==================================================
FORM VALIDATION
==================================================

CategoryProduct schema:

z.object({
  name: z.string().min(1, "Name is required"),
  description: z.string().optional()
})

Product schema:

z.object({
  name: z.string().min(1, "Name is required"),
  description: z.string().min(1, "Description is required"),
  price: z.number().min(0, "Price must be >= 0"),
  category: z.string().min(1, "Category is required"),
  image: z.string().optional()
})

==================================================
IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS
==================================================

- React Query v5:
  - useQuery for list
  - useMutation for create/update/delete
  - invalidate properly

- Axios base instance

- Use shadcn components:
  - Table
  - Input
  - Button
  - Dialog
  - AlertDialog
  - Select
  - Pagination

- Delete must use confirm dialog
- Proper loading skeleton
- Proper TypeScript typing

==================================================
DASHBOARD MENU
==================================================

Add 2 new menu items in dashboard sidebar:

- Category Products → /dashboard/category-products
- Products → /dashboard/products

Use proper icon from lucide-react.

==================================================
CODE REQUIREMENTS
==================================================

- Fully typed
- No pseudo code
- No missing files
- Clean architecture
- Production-ready

Generate full working code.
Do not skip any file.
